<link rel="stylesheet" id="fav-css" href="https://www.tech4lyf.com/wp-content/themes/t4l/images/favicon.png?ver=1" type="text/css" media="all"><style id="cw-widget-styles" data-turbo-permanent="true">
:root {
  --b-100: #F2F3F7;
  --s-700: #37546D;
}

.woot-widget-holder {
  box-shadow: 0 5px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, .16);
  opacity: 1;
  will-change: transform, opacity;
  transform: translateY(0);
  overflow: hidden !important;
  position: fixed !important;
  transition: opacity 0.2s linear, transform 0.25s linear;
  z-index: 2147483000 !important;
}

.woot-widget-holder.woot-widget-holder--flat {
  box-shadow: none;
  border-radius: 0;
  border: 1px solid var(--b-100);
}

.woot-widget-holder iframe {
  border: 0;
  color-scheme: normal;
  height: 100% !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  max-height: 100vh !important;
}

.woot-widget-holder.has-unread-view {
  border-radius: 0 !important;
  min-height: 80px !important;
  height: auto;
  bottom: 94px;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  border: 0;
}

.woot-widget-bubble {
  background: #1f93ff;
  border-radius: 100px;
  border-width: 0px;
  bottom: 20px;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, .16) !important;
  cursor: pointer;
  height: 64px;
  padding: 0px;
  position: fixed;
  user-select: none;
  width: 64px;
  z-index: 2147483000 !important;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.woot-widget-bubble.woot-widget-bubble--flat {
  border-radius: 0;
}

.woot-widget-holder.woot-widget-holder--flat {
  bottom: 90px;
}

.woot-widget-bubble.woot-widget-bubble--flat {
  height: 56px;
  width: 56px;
}

.woot-widget-bubble.woot-widget-bubble--flat svg {
  margin: 16px;
}

.woot-widget-bubble.woot-widget-bubble--flat.woot--close::before,
.woot-widget-bubble.woot-widget-bubble--flat.woot--close::after {
  left: 28px;
  top: 16px;
}

.woot-widget-bubble.unread-notification::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  background: #ff4040;
  border-radius: 100%;
  top: 0px;
  right: 0px;
  border: 2px solid #ffffff;
  transition: background 0.2s ease;
}

.woot-widget-bubble.woot-widget--expanded {
  bottom: 24px;
  display: flex;
  height: 48px !important;
  width: auto !important;
  align-items: center;
}

.woot-widget-bubble.woot-widget--expanded div {
  align-items: center;
  color: #fff;
  display: flex;
  font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, Oxygen-Sans, Ubuntu, Cantarell, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif;
  font-size: 16px;
  font-weight: 500;
  justify-content: center;
  padding-right: 20px;
  width: auto !important;
}

.woot-widget-bubble.woot-widget--expanded.woot-widget-bubble-color--lighter div{
  color: var(--s-700);
}

.woot-widget-bubble.woot-widget--expanded svg {
  height: 20px;

  width: 20px;
}

.woot-widget-bubble.woot-elements--left {
  left: 20px;
}

.woot-widget-bubble.woot-elements--right {
  right: 20px;
}

.woot-widget-bubble:hover {
  background: #1f93ff;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, .4) !important;
}

.woot-widget-bubble svg {
  all: revert;
  height: 24px;
  margin: 20px;
  width: 24px;
}

}

  .woot-widget-holder.woot-elements--left {

}

.woot--close:hover {
  opacity: 1;
}

.woot--close::before, .woot--close::after {
  background-color: #fff;
  content: ' ';
  display: inline;
  height: 24px;
  left: 32px;
  position: absolute;
  top: 20px;
  width: 2px;
}

.woot-widget-bubble-color--lighter.woot--close::before, .woot-widget-bubble-color--lighter.woot--close::after {
  background-color: var(--s-700);
}

.woot--close::before {
  transform: rotate(45deg);
}

.woot--close::after {
  transform: rotate(-45deg);
}

.woot--hide {
  bottom: -100vh !important;
  top: unset !important;
  opacity: 0;
  visibility: hidden !important;
  z-index: -1 !important;
}

.woot-widget--without-bubble {
  bottom: 20px !important;
}
.woot-widget-holder.woot--hide{
  transform: translateY(40px);
}
.woot-widget-bubble.woot--close {
  transform: translateX(0px) scale(1) rotate(0deg);
  transition: transform 300ms ease, opacity 100ms ease, visibility 0ms linear 0ms, bottom 0ms linear 0ms;
}
.woot-widget-bubble.woot--close.woot--hide {
  transform: translateX(8px) scale(.75) rotate(45deg);
  transition: transform 300ms ease, opacity 200ms ease, visibility 0ms linear 500ms, bottom 0ms ease 200ms;
}

.woot-widget-bubble {
  transform-origin: center;
  will-change: transform, opacity;
  transform: translateX(0) scale(1) rotate(0deg);
  transition: transform 300ms ease, opacity 100ms ease, visibility 0ms linear 0ms, bottom 0ms linear 0ms;
}
.woot-widget-bubble.woot--hide {
  transform: translateX(8px) scale(.75) rotate(-30deg);
  transition: transform 300ms ease, opacity 200ms ease, visibility 0ms linear 500ms, bottom 0ms ease 200ms;
}

.woot-widget-bubble.woot-widget--expanded {
  transform: translateX(0px);
  transition: transform 300ms ease, opacity 100ms ease, visibility 0ms linear 0ms, bottom 0ms linear 0ms;
}
.woot-widget-bubble.woot-widget--expanded.woot--hide {
  transform: translateX(8px);
  transition: transform 300ms ease, opacity 200ms ease, visibility 0ms linear 500ms, bottom 0ms ease 200ms;
}
.woot-widget-bubble.woot-widget-bubble--flat.woot--close {
  transform: translateX(0px);
  transition: transform 300ms ease, opacity 10ms ease, visibility 0ms linear 0ms, bottom 0ms linear 0ms;
}
.woot-widget-bubble.woot-widget-bubble--flat.woot--close.woot--hide {
  transform: translateX(8px);
  transition: transform 300ms ease, opacity 200ms ease, visibility 0ms linear 500ms, bottom 0ms ease 200ms;
}
.woot-widget-bubble.woot-widget--expanded.woot-widget-bubble--flat {
  transform: translateX(0px);
  transition: transform 300ms ease, opacity 200ms ease, visibility 0ms linear 0ms, bottom 0ms linear 0ms;
}
.woot-widget-bubble.woot-widget--expanded.woot-widget-bubble--flat.woot--hide {
  transform: translateX(8px);
  transition: transform 300ms ease, opacity 200ms ease, visibility 0ms linear 500ms, bottom 0ms ease 200ms;
}

@media only screen and (max-width: 667px) {
  .woot-widget-holder {
    height: 100%;
    right: 0;
    top: 0;
    width: 100%;
 }

 .woot-widget-holder.has-unread-view.woot-elements--left {

                          <style>
    

    .t4-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;}
    .t4-logo{height:28px;width:auto;display:block;border-radius:6px;}

    /* ---------- Colorful glass badge ---------- */
    .ny-badge{
      --c1:#4A90E2; /* violet */
      --c2:#E04048; /* cyan */
      --c3:#F5A623; /* mint */
      --c4:#3CB878; /* pink */
      --c5:#FFD166; /* gold */

      position:relative;
      height:30px;
      min-width:132px;
      padding:0 12px;
      border-radius:999px;
      border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.16);
      background: rgba(10,12,22,.55);
      box-shadow:
        0 12px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.40),
        0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.06) inset;
      backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
      -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
      overflow:hidden;
      isolation:isolate;
      user-select:none;
    }

    /* Animated gradient aura (cheap but premium) */
    .ny-aura{
      position:absolute;
      inset:-50% -70%;
      background: conic-gradient(from 0deg, var(--c2), var(--c4), var(--c1), var(--c3));
      filter: blur(14px) saturate(1.3);
      opacity:.55;
      z-index:0;
      animation: aura 6.2s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
      will-change: transform;
      pointer-events:none;
    }
    @keyframes aura{
      from{ transform: translateX(-10%) rotate(0deg); }
      to  { transform: translateX(10%) rotate(22deg); }
    }

    /* Shine sweep */
    .ny-badge::after{
      content:"";
      position:absolute;
      inset:-60% -45%;
      background: linear-gradient(110deg, transparent 35%, rgba(255,255,255,.92) 45%, transparent 55%);
      transform: translateX(-70%);
      opacity:0;
      z-index:6;
      pointer-events:none;
    }

    /* Burst canvas (only during roll) */
    .ny-canvas{
      position:absolute;
      inset:-12px -14px;
      width:calc(100% + 28px);
      height:calc(100% + 24px);
      pointer-events:none;
      opacity:0;
      z-index:2;
      transition: opacity 160ms ease-out;
    }

    /* Layout content */
    .ny-content{
      position:relative;
      z-index:4;
      height:100%;
      display:flex;
      align-items:center;
      gap:8px;
    }
    .ny-label{
      font-size:10px;
      letter-spacing:.18em;
      text-transform:uppercase;
      color: rgba(255,255,255,.78);
      white-space:nowrap;
    }

    /* ---------- Slot digits (odometer) ---------- */
    .ny-digits{display:flex;gap:3px;align-items:center;}

    .slot{
      width:16px;
      height:20px;
      border-radius:7px;
      border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.16);
      background: rgba(255,255,255,.10);
      box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.22);
      overflow:hidden;
      position:relative;
    }

    /* Center split line */
    .slot::after{
      content:"";
      position:absolute;
      left:0; right:0; top:50%;
      height:1px;
      transform: translateY(-.5px);
      background: rgba(255,255,255,.16);
      pointer-events:none;
    }

    .wheel{
      position:absolute;
      left:0; right:0; top:0;
      transform: translateY(0);
      will-change: transform;
      transform: translateZ(0); /* helps prevent GPU flicker */
    }

    .n{
      height:20px; /* must match slot height */
      display:grid;
      place-items:center;
      font-size:12px;
      display:flex;
      justify-content:center;
      align-items:center;
      font-weight:950;
      color: rgba(255,255,255,.96);
      text-shadow: 0 0 18px rgba(0,210,255,.20);
    }

    /* Rolling state */
    .ny-badge.is-roll{
      box-shadow:
        0 14px 34px rgba(0,0,0,.45),
        0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.06) inset,
        0 0 28px rgba(0,210,255,.22);
      border-color: rgba(255,255,255,.22);
    }
    .ny-badge.is-roll::after{
      opacity:1;
      animation: shine 1100ms ease-out forwards;
    }
    @keyframes shine{
      0%{ transform: translateX(-70%); opacity:0; }
      15%{ opacity:1; }
      100%{ transform: translateX(70%); opacity:0; }
    }
    .ny-badge.is-roll .ny-canvas{opacity:1;}

    /* Reduced motion */
    @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){
      .ny-aura,.ny-badge::after,.ny-canvas{display:none !important;}
    }
  </style>

  <script>
    (function(){
      const badge  = document.getElementById("badge");
      const canvas = document.getElementById("fx");
      const ctx    = canvas.getContext("2d", { alpha:true });
      const wheels = [...badge.querySelectorAll(".wheel")];

      const YEAR_A = "2025";
      const YEAR_B = "2026";

      // Longer timings (as requested)
      const HOLD_MS   = 2200;  // show current year longer
      const ROLL_MS   = 1700;  // long roll duration
      const SETTLE_MS = 1400;  // hold after roll

      const ROW_H = 20; // must match .n height

      function resizeCanvas(){
        const r = badge.getBoundingClientRect();
        canvas.width  = Math.max(1, Math.floor(r.width + 28));
        canvas.height = Math.max(1, Math.floor(r.height + 24));
      }

      // Build wheel: 0..9 repeated + final target at end (smooth stop)
      function buildWheelTo(targetDigit){
        const frag = document.createDocumentFragment();

        // show current digit first for continuity (optional)
        // then 3 loops for long roll
        for (let loop=0; loop<3; loop++){
          for (let d=0; d<=9; d++){
            const div = document.createElement("div");
            div.className = "n";
            div.textContent = String(d);
            frag.appendChild(div);
          }
        }

        // final target
        const end = document.createElement("div");
        end.className = "n";
        end.textContent = String(targetDigit);
        frag.appendChild(end);

        // the final target sits at index 30 (3*10)
        return { frag, endIndex: 30 };
      }

      function setStaticYear(yearStr){
        wheels.forEach((w, i) => {
          w.innerHTML = "";
          const div = document.createElement("div");
          div.className = "n";
          div.textContent = yearStr[i];
          w.appendChild(div);
          w.style.transform = "translateY(0px)";
        });
      }

      // --- FX canvas burst (colorful, runs only during roll) ---
      const colors = ["#6D5BFF","#00D2FF","#00FFA3","#FF4FD8","#FFD166","#A8FF78"];
      let particles = [];
      let raf = null;
      let last = 0;
      let startAt = 0;

      function spawnBurst(){
        particles = [];
        const w = canvas.width, h = canvas.height;
        const cx = w/2, cy = h/2;
        const count = 92;

        for (let i=0;i<count;i++){
          const a = Math.random()*Math.PI*2;
          const sp = 140 + Math.random()*260;
          particles.push({
            x: cx + (Math.random()*6 - 3),
            y: cy + (Math.random()*6 - 3),
            vx: Math.cos(a)*sp,
            vy: Math.sin(a)*sp,
            r: 1.1 + Math.random()*1.8,
            life: 0.9 + Math.random()*0.45,
            age: 0,
            c: colors[(Math.random()*colors.length)|0]
          });
        }
      }

      function tick(t){
        if (!startAt) startAt = t;
        if (!last) last = t;
        const dt = Math.min(0.033, (t-last)/1000);
        last = t;

        const w = canvas.width, h = canvas.height;
        ctx.clearRect(0,0,w,h);

        // soft glow wash
        const g = ctx.createRadialGradient(w/2,h/2,2,w/2,h/2,Math.min(w,h)*0.6);
        g.addColorStop(0,"rgba(0,210,255,.14)");
        g.addColorStop(0.45,"rgba(255,79,216,.10)");
        g.addColorStop(1,"rgba(0,0,0,0)");
        ctx.fillStyle = g;
        ctx.fillRect(0,0,w,h);

        let alive = 0;
        for (const p of particles){
          p.age += dt;
          if (p.age >= p.life) continue;
          alive++;

          const k = 1 - (p.age/p.life);
          p.x += p.vx*dt;
          p.y += p.vy*dt;
          p.vx *= 0.988;
          p.vy *= 0.988;

          // dot
          ctx.globalAlpha = 0.95*k;
          ctx.fillStyle = p.c;
          ctx.beginPath();
          ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, p.r, 0, Math.PI*2);
          ctx.fill();

          // tiny trail
          ctx.globalAlpha = 0.18*k;
          ctx.strokeStyle = p.c;
          ctx.lineWidth = 1;
          ctx.beginPath();
          ctx.moveTo(p.x, p.y);
          ctx.lineTo(p.x - p.vx*dt*0.12, p.y - p.vy*dt*0.12);
          ctx.stroke();

          ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
        }

        // keep FX running slightly beyond roll for smoothness
        if (alive > 0 && (t - startAt) < (ROLL_MS + 350)){
          raf = requestAnimationFrame(tick);
        } else {
          cancelAnimationFrame(raf);
          raf = null;
          setTimeout(()=>{ canvas.style.opacity = "0"; }, 180);
        }
      }

      function startFX(){
        resizeCanvas();
        canvas.style.opacity = "1";
        spawnBurst();
        last = 0; startAt = 0;
        if (!raf) raf = requestAnimationFrame(tick);
      }

      // Easing for wheel animation
      function easeOutCubic(x){ return 1 - Math.pow(1 - x, 3); }

      function animateWheel(el, fromY, toY, durMs){
        const start = performance.now();
        function step(now){
          const t = Math.min(1, (now - start) / durMs);
          const e = easeOutCubic(t);
          const y = fromY + (toY - fromY) * e;
          el.style.transform = `translateY(${y}px)`;
          if (t < 1) requestAnimationFrame(step);
        }
        requestAnimationFrame(step);
      }

      function rollToYear(targetYear){
        wheels.forEach((w, i) => {
          const targetDigit = Number(targetYear[i]);
          const { frag, endIndex } = buildWheelTo(targetDigit);
          w.innerHTML = "";
          w.appendChild(frag);

          const endY = -endIndex * ROW_H;
          // stagger for a nicer feel
          const dur = ROLL_MS + i * 90;
          animateWheel(w, 0, endY, dur);
        });
      }

      // ---- IMPORTANT: No blink cleanup ----
      // After roll: DO NOT rebuild the whole wheel and reset while animation finishes.
      // Instead: keep only the last node and reset transform to 0.
      function cleanupToSingleDigit(){
        wheels.forEach(w => {
          const nums = w.querySelectorAll(".n");
          const lastNode = nums[nums.length - 1]; // final target digit
          w.innerHTML = "";
          w.appendChild(lastNode);
          w.style.transform = "translateY(0px)";
        });
      }

      // Loop state machine
      let showA = true;

      function loop(){
        const current = showA ? YEAR_A : YEAR_B;
        const next    = showA ? YEAR_B : YEAR_A;

        // 1) Show current year (static)
        badge.classList.remove("is-roll");
        setStaticYear(current);

        setTimeout(() => {
          // 2) Start roll + effects
          badge.classList.add("is-roll");
          startFX();
          rollToYear(next);

          // 3) After roll ends, clean up without blink
          setTimeout(() => {
            badge.classList.remove("is-roll");
            cleanupToSingleDigit();   // <-- fixes blinking
            showA = !showA;

            setTimeout(loop, SETTLE_MS);
          }, ROLL_MS + 320);

        }, HOLD_MS);
      }

      // Init
      resizeCanvas();
      setStaticYear(YEAR_A);
      loop();

      window.addEventListener("resize", resizeCanvas, { passive:true });
    })();
  </script>

</script>

/* Button style */
.animated-btn {
    position: relative;
    padding: 8px 30px;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-top: 15px;
    color: #fff;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 50px;
    cursor: pointer;
    display: flex;
    gap: 15px;
    align-items: center;
    background: linear-gradient(45deg, #ff4b2b, #ff416c, #ff8c00);
    background-size: 300% 300%;
    transition: all 0.4s ease;
    overflow: hidden;
    margin: 15px 0 0 auto;
}

.animated-btn:hover {
    background-position: right center;
    box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(255, 65, 108, 0.5);
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

.ripple {
    position: absolute;
    border-radius: 50%;
    transform: scale(0);
    animation: ripple-animation 0.6s linear;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
}

@keyframes ripple-animation {
    to {
        transform: scale(4);
        opacity: 0;
    }
}

.pos_rel{
position:relative;

}
.over_x{
overflow-x:hidden;
}
.pos_abs{
position:absolute;
}

            <script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {

    // Toggle .inner_sub_menu on Services click
    document.querySelector('.services-toggle').addEventListener('click', function (e) {
        e.stopPropagation();
        this.classList.add("active");
        const menu = document.querySelector('.inner_sub_menu');
        menu.style.display = (menu.style.display === 'block') ? 'none' : 'block';

        // Close all nested dropdowns when parent menu closes
        if (menu.style.display === 'none') {
            this.classList.remove("active");
            document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-menu-inner').forEach(function (el) {

                el.style.display = 'none';
            });
        }
    });

    // Toggle each dropdown-menu-inner on category click
    document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-list > a').forEach(function (item) {
        item.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
            e.stopPropagation();
            
            
            
            const dropdownMenu = this.nextElementSibling;

            if (dropdownMenu && dropdownMenu.classList.contains('dropdown-menu-inner')) {
                // Close other open menus
                

                document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-menu-inner').forEach(function (el) {
                    if (el !== dropdownMenu) {
                        el.style.display = 'none';
                    }
                });

                // Toggle current one
                dropdownMenu.style.display = (dropdownMenu.style.display === 'block') ? 'none' : 'block';
            }
        });
    });

    // Optional: click outside to close all
    document.addEventListener('click', function () {
        document.querySelector('.inner_sub_menu').style.display = 'none';
        document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-menu-inner').forEach(function (el) {
            el.style.display = 'none';
        });
    });
});
</script>

<hr data-start="1212" data-end="1215" class="skrollable skrollable-between" style="transition: none; transform: translateY(0px); opacity: 1;">
<h2 data-start="1217" data-end="1251" class="skrollable skrollable-between" style="transition: none; transform: translateY(0px); opacity: 1;">1. Introduction to Odoo Modules</h2>
<p data-start="1252" data-end="1436" class="skrollable skrollable-between" style="transition: none; transform: translateY(0px); opacity: 1;"><strong data-start="1252" data-end="1268" class="skrollable skrollable-between">Odoo modules</strong> are the building blocks of the <strong data-start="1300" data-end="1319" class="skrollable skrollable-between">Odoo ERP system</strong>, each designed to manage specific business functions like <strong data-start="1378" data-end="1433" class="skrollable skrollable-between">sales, accounting, HR, inventory, and manufacturing</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="1438" data-end="1570" class="skrollable skrollable-between" style="transition: none; transform: translateY(0px); opacity: 1;">Odoo’s modular design allows businesses to <strong data-start="1481" data-end="1507" class="skrollable skrollable-between">start small and expand</strong>, making it one of the most <strong data-start="1535" data-end="1559" class="skrollable skrollable-between">flexible ERP systems</strong> in 2025.</p>
<hr data-start="1572" data-end="1575" class="skrollable skrollable-between" style="transition: none; transform: translateY(0px); opacity: 1;">
<h2 data-start="1577" data-end="1621" class="skrollable skrollable-between" style="transition: none; transform: translateY(0px); opacity: 1;">2. Why Odoo Modules are Essential in 2025</h2>
<ul data-start="1622" data-end="1878" class="skrollable skrollable-between" style="transition: none; transform: translateY(0px); opacity: 1;">
<li data-start="1622" data-end="1686" class="skrollable skrollable-between">
<p data-start="1624" data-end="1686" class="skrollable skrollable-between">Businesses demand <strong data-start="1642" data-end="1657" class="skrollable skrollable-between">flexibility</strong> instead of monolithic ERP.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1687" data-end="1740" class="skrollable skrollable-between">
<p data-start="1689" data-end="1740" class="skrollable skrollable-between"><strong data-start="1689" data-end="1713" class="skrollable skrollable-between">SMEs and enterprises</strong> need tailored solutions.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1741" data-end="1805" class="skrollable skrollable-between">
<p data-start="1743" data-end="1805" class="skrollable skrollable-between"><strong data-start="1743" data-end="1774" class="skrollable skrollable-between">Industry-specific workflows</strong> require specialized modules.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1806" data-end="1878" class="skrollable skrollable-between">
<p data-start="1808" data-end="1878" class="skrollable skrollable-between"><strong data-start="1808" data-end="1853" class="skrollable skrollable-between">Integration with IoT, CRM, and e-commerce</strong> relies on modular ERP.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="1880" data-end="1883" class="skrollable skrollable-between" style="transition: none; transform: translateY(0px); opacity: 1;">
<h2 data-start="1885" data-end="1912" class="skrollable skrollable-between" style="transition: none; transform: translateY(0px); opacity: 1;">3. Types of Odoo Modules</h2>
<ul data-start="1913" data-end="2172" class="skrollable skrollable-between" style="transition: none; transform: translateY(0px); opacity: 1;">
<li data-start="1913" data-end="1963" class="skrollable skrollable-between">
<p data-start="1915" data-end="1963" class="skrollable skrollable-between"><strong data-start="1915" data-end="1931" class="skrollable skrollable-between">Core Modules</strong> – Standard Odoo ERP features.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1964" data-end="2030" class="skrollable skrollable-between">
<p data-start="1966" data-end="2030" class="skrollable skrollable-between"><strong data-start="1966" data-end="1988" class="skrollable skrollable-between">Enterprise Modules</strong> – Premium features for large companies.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="2031" data-end="2102" class="skrollable skrollable-between">
<p data-start="2033" data-end="2102" class="skrollable skrollable-between"><strong data-start="2033" data-end="2051" class="skrollable skrollable-between">Custom Modules</strong> – Industry-specific or company-specific add-ons.</p>
</li>
<li data-start="2103" data-end="2172" class="skrollable skrollable-between">
<p data-start="2105" data-end="2172" class="skrollable skrollable-between"><strong data-start="2105" data-end="2128" class="skrollable skrollable-between">Third-Party Modules</strong> – Built by Odoo developers and community.</p>
</li>
</ul>

<hr data-start="2764" data-end="2767" class="skrollable skrollable-between" style="transition: none; transform: translateY(0px); opacity: 1;">
<h2 data-start="2769" data-end="2805" class="skrollable skrollable-between" style="transition: none; transform: translateY(0px); opacity: 1;">5. Industry-Specific Odoo Modules</h2>
<ul data-start="2806" data-end="3101" class="skrollable skrollable-between" style="transition: none; transform: translateY(0px); opacity: 1;">

<p data-start="3049" data-end="3101" class="skrollable skrollable-between"><strong data-start="3049" data-end="3066" class="skrollable skrollable-between">Manufacturing</strong> – IoT-based production tracking.</p>

Can I build custom Odoo modules?</strong><br data-start="6227" data-end="6230" class="skrollable skrollable-between">Yes, Odoo allows <strong data-start="6247" data-end="6276" class="skrollable skrollable-between">custom module development</strong> for industries.</p>
<p data-start="6296" data-end="6438" class="skrollable skrollable-between" style="transition: none; transform: translateY(50px); opacity: 0;"><strong data-start="6296" data-end="6352" class="skrollable skrollable-between">Q5. Why choose Tech4LYF for Odoo module development?</strong><br data-start="6352" data-end="6355" class="skrollable skrollable-between">Because Tech4LYF builds <strong data-start="6379" data-end="6435" class="skrollable skrollable-between">secure, scalable, and industry-specific Odoo modules</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="6296" data-end="6438" class="skrollable skrollable-between" style="transition: none; transform: translateY(50px); opacity: 0;"><strong>“Odoo Migration — Upgrading to the Latest Version”</strong></p>
<p style="transition: none; transform: translateY(50px); opacity: 0;">“Businesses running older Odoo versions (v12, v14, v15) should consider migrating to Odoo 17 for improved performance, security updates, and new features. Migration types include: version migration (upgrading Odoo releases), database migration (transferring data to new instances), module migration (updating custom modules for compatibility), and customization migration (rebuilding workflows for the new version). Migration costs in India range from ₹5 lakhs to ₹3 crore depending on scale. Tech4LYF provides end-to-end Odoo migration services with zero-downtime deployment and data validation.”</p>
<hr data-start="6440" data-end="6443" class="skrollable skrollable-between" style="transition: none; transform: translateY(50px); opacity: 0;">
<h2 data-start="6445" data-end="6462" class="skrollable skrollable-between" style="transition: none; transform: translateY(50px); opacity: 0;">17. Conclusion</h2>
<p data-start="6463" data-end="6529" class="skrollable skrollable-between" style="transition: none; transform: translateY(50px); opacity: 0;">In 2025, <strong data-start="6472" data-end="6526" class="skrollable skrollable-between">Odoo modules are the backbone of ERP customization</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="6531" data-end="6629" class="skrollable skrollable-between" style="transition: none; transform: translateY(50px); opacity: 0;">They allow businesses to <strong data-start="6556" data-end="6590" class="skrollable skrollable-between">scale, integrate, and innovate</strong> faster than traditional ERP systems.</p>
<p data-start="6631" data-end="6768" class="skrollable skrollable-between" style="transition: none; transform: translateY(50px); opacity: 0;">With <a href="https://www.tech4lyf.com/"><strong data-start="6636" data-end="6660" class="skrollable skrollable-between">Tech4LYF Corporation</strong></a>, enterprises can deploy <strong data-start="6685" data-end="6708" class="skrollable skrollable-between">custom Odoo modules</strong> designed to deliver <strong data-start="6729" data-end="6765" class="skrollable skrollable-between">efficiency, scalability, and ROI</strong>.</p>

            $('.pop_enq').fadeOut();

<script>
function getOS() {
  const userAgent = navigator.userAgent;
  if (/windows nt 10/i.test(userAgent)) return "Windows 10";
  if (/windows nt 6.3/i.test(userAgent)) return "Windows 8.1";
  if (/windows nt 6.2/i.test(userAgent)) return "Windows 8";
  if (/windows nt 6.1/i.test(userAgent)) return "Windows 7";
  if (/windows nt 6.0/i.test(userAgent)) return "Windows Vista";
  if (/windows nt 5.1/i.test(userAgent)) return "Windows XP";
  if (/macintosh|mac os x/i.test(userAgent)) return "Mac OS X";
  if (/linux/i.test(userAgent)) return "Linux";
  if (/iphone/i.test(userAgent)) return "iPhone";
  if (/android/i.test(userAgent)) return "Android";
  return "Unknown OS";
}

async function submitConsultation() {
  const name = document.getElementById('name').value.trim();
  const phone = document.getElementById('phone').value.trim();
  const email = document.getElementById('email').value.trim();
  const comment = document.getElementById('comment').value.trim();
  const os = getOS();
  if(name!="" && phone!="" && email!=""){
  
    let ip = "Unknown";
    let country = "Unknown";
    try {
        const ipData = await fetch("https://ipwho.is/").then(res => res.json());
        ip = ipData.ip || ip;
        country = ipData.country || country;
    } catch (err) {
        console.error("IP API error:", err);
    }

    const data = { name, phone, email, comment, os, ip, location: country };

    // Send to PHP backend
    fetch("https://www.tech4lyf.com/consultation_back.php", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify(data)
    })
    .then(res => {
        if (res.ok) {
        alert("Submitted successfully!");
        location.href = "/";
        } else {
        alert("Error while submitting.");
        }
    });
  }
  else{
    alert("Fields are empty!");
  }
  // Get IP and Country
}




	
function t4lSwitchTab(panel, btn){
  document.querySelectorAll('.t4l-tab-btn').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.t4l-panel').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  document.getElementById('panel-' + panel).classList.add('active');
}

function t4lToggleChip(el){
  el.classList.toggle('selected');
}

function t4lGetChips(containerId){
  return [...document.querySelectorAll('#' + containerId + ' .t4l-chip.selected')]
    .map(c => c.textContent.trim());
}

function t4lToggleOther(prefix){
  const sel = document.getElementById(prefix + '_hear');
  const wrap = document.getElementById(prefix + '_other_wrap');
  const input = document.getElementById(prefix + '_hear_other');

  if(sel.value === 'Other'){
    wrap.classList.remove('d-none');
  } else {
    wrap.classList.add('d-none');
    if (input) input.value = '';
  }
}

function getOS(){
  const ua = navigator.userAgent;
  if(/windows nt 10/i.test(ua)) return "Windows 10";
  if(/windows/i.test(ua)) return "Windows";
  if(/macintosh|mac os x/i.test(ua)) return "Mac OS X";
  if(/iphone/i.test(ua)) return "iPhone";
  if(/android/i.test(ua)) return "Android";
  if(/linux/i.test(ua)) return "Linux";
  return "Unknown OS";
}

function showSuccessMessage(text = "Thank you! Your request has been submitted."){
  const successBox = document.getElementById("successMessage");
  const title = successBox ? successBox.querySelector("h5") : null;
  if (title) title.textContent = text;
  if (!successBox) return;

  successBox.classList.add("show");
  setTimeout(() => {
    successBox.classList.remove("show");
  }, 5000);
}

function t4lValidateEmail(email){
  return /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/.test(email);
}

function t4lNormalizePhone(phone){
  return (phone || '').replace(/[^\d]/g, '');
}

async function t4lGetIpInfo(){
  try{
    const res = await fetch("https://ipwho.is/");
    const data = await res.json();
    return {
      ip: data.ip || "Unknown",
      country: data.country || "Unknown"
    };
  } catch(e){
    return {
      ip: "Unknown",
      country: "Unknown"
    };
  }
}

async function t4lPostContact(data){
  const url =
    data.form_type === 'job_application'
      ? "https://www.tech4lyf.com/career_back.php"
      : "https://www.tech4lyf.com/business_back.php";

  const res = await fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    body: JSON.stringify(data)
  });

  const result = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));

  if (!res.ok) {
    throw new Error(result.message || "Submission failed");
  }

  return result;
}

async function createLead(data1){
  const url = "https://api.tech4lyf.com/create-lead";

  const leadTitle =
    data1.form_type === "job_application"
      ? `Career Application - ${data1.name} - ${data1.roles || data1.jposi || ''}`
      : `Business Inquiry - ${data1.cname} - ${data1.services || 'General Inquiry'}`;

  const data = {
    name: leadTitle,
    email_from: data1.email,
    mobile: `${data1.pcode || ''}${data1.phone || ''}`,
    contact_name: data1.name,
    function: data1.jposi || "",
    partner_name: data1.cname || ""
  };

  try{
    const r = await fetch(url, {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type":"application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify(data)
    });
    return await r.json().catch(() => ({}));
  } catch(err){
    console.error("Lead error:", err);
    return null;
  }
}

async function t4lSubmitBiz(btn){
  try{
    if (btn) btn.disabled = true;

    const name = document.getElementById('biz_name').value.trim();
    const email = document.getElementById('biz_email').value.trim();
    const phone = t4lNormalizePhone(document.getElementById('biz_phone').value.trim());
    const pcode = document.getElementById('biz_countryCode').value.trim();
    const cname = document.getElementById('biz_cname').value.trim();
    const jposi = document.getElementById('biz_jposi').value.trim();
    const comment = document.getElementById('biz_comment').value.trim();
    const hearAbout = document.getElementById('biz_hear').value.trim();
    const hearAboutOther = document.getElementById('biz_hear_other')?.value.trim() || '';
    const services = t4lGetChips('biz_services');
    const industry = document.getElementById('biz_industry').value.trim();
    const companySize = document.getElementById('biz_companysize').value.trim();
    const budget = document.getElementById('biz_budget').value.trim();
    const timeline = document.getElementById('biz_timeline').value.trim();
    const os = getOS();

    if(!name || !email || !phone || !cname){
      alert('Please fill Name, Email, Phone and Company Name.');
      return;
    }

    if(!t4lValidateEmail(email)){
      alert('Please enter a valid email address.');
      return;
    }

    if(services.length === 0){
      alert('Please select at least one service.');
      return;
    }

    if(hearAbout === 'Other' && !hearAboutOther){
      alert('Please specify how you heard about us.');
      return;
    }

    const ipInfo = await t4lGetIpInfo();

    let fullComment = comment || '';
    if(services.length) fullComment += `\n\n[Services: ${services.join(', ')}]`;
    if(industry) fullComment += `\n[Industry: ${industry}]`;
    if(companySize) fullComment += `\n[Company Size: ${companySize}]`;
    if(budget) fullComment += `\n[Budget: ${budget}]`;
    if(timeline) fullComment += `\n[Timeline: ${timeline}]`;

    const data = {
      form_type: 'business_inquiry',
      name,
      email,
      pcode,
      phone,
      cname,
      jposi,
      comment: fullComment,
      reference: hearAbout,
      other_ref: hearAboutOther,
      services: services.join(', '),
      industry,
      company_size: companySize,
      budget,
      timeline,
      career_type: '',
      experience: '',
      roles: '',
      portfolio: '',
      os,
      ip: ipInfo.ip,
      location: ipInfo.country
    };

    await t4lPostContact(data);
    showSuccessMessage("Thank you! Your business inquiry has been submitted.");
    createLead(data);

    document.getElementById('biz_name').value = '';
    document.getElementById('biz_email').value = '';
    document.getElementById('biz_phone').value = '';
    document.getElementById('biz_cname').value = '';
    document.getElementById('biz_jposi').value = '';
    document.getElementById('biz_comment').value = '';
    document.getElementById('biz_hear').value = '';
    document.getElementById('biz_hear_other').value = '';
    document.getElementById('biz_industry').value = '';
    document.getElementById('biz_companysize').value = '';
    document.getElementById('biz_budget').value = '';
    document.getElementById('biz_timeline').value = '';
    document.querySelectorAll('#biz_services .t4l-chip.selected').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('selected'));
    document.getElementById('biz_other_wrap').classList.add('d-none');

  } catch(err){
    console.error(err);
    alert(err.message || "Error while submitting. Please try again.");
  } finally {
    if (btn) btn.disabled = false;
  }
}

async function t4lSubmitCareer(btn){
  try{
    if (btn) btn.disabled = true;

    const name = document.getElementById('career_name').value.trim();
    const email = document.getElementById('career_email').value.trim();
    const phone = t4lNormalizePhone(document.getElementById('career_phone').value.trim());
    const pcode = document.getElementById('career_countryCode').value.trim();
    const careerType = document.getElementById('career_type').value.trim();
    const experience = document.getElementById('career_exp').value.trim();
    const roles = t4lGetChips('career_roles');
    const company = document.getElementById('career_company').value.trim();
    const portfolio = document.getElementById('career_portfolio').value.trim();
    const message = document.getElementById('career_message').value.trim();
    const hearAbout = document.getElementById('career_hear').value.trim();
    const hearAboutOther = document.getElementById('career_hear_other')?.value.trim() || '';
    const os = getOS();

    if(!name || !email || !phone){
      alert('Please fill Name, Email and Phone.');
      return;
    }

    if(!t4lValidateEmail(email)){
      alert('Please enter a valid email address.');
      return;
    }

    if(!careerType){
      alert('Please select what you are applying for.');
      return;
    }

    if(roles.length === 0){
      alert('Please select at least one role.');
      return;
    }

    if(hearAbout === 'Other' && !hearAboutOther){
      alert('Please specify how you heard about this.');
      return;
    }

    const ipInfo = await t4lGetIpInfo();

    let fullComment = '[JOB APPLICATION]';
    fullComment += `\nType: ${careerType}`;
    fullComment += `\nRoles: ${roles.join(', ')}`;
    if(experience) fullComment += `\nExperience: ${experience}`;
    if(company) fullComment += `\nCurrent/Last Company: ${company}`;
    if(portfolio) fullComment += `\nPortfolio: ${portfolio}`;
    if(message) fullComment += `\n\nMotivation: ${message}`;

    const data = {
      form_type: 'job_application',
      name,
      email,
      pcode,
      phone,
      cname: company || 'Job Applicant',
      jposi: `${careerType} - ${roles.join(', ')}`,
      comment: fullComment,
      reference: hearAbout,
      other_ref: hearAboutOther,
      services: '',
      industry: '',
      company_size: '',
      budget: '',
      timeline: '',
      career_type: careerType,
      experience,
      roles: roles.join(', '),
      portfolio,
      os,
      ip: ipInfo.ip,
      location: ipInfo.country
    };

    await t4lPostContact(data);
    showSuccessMessage("Thank you! Your application has been submitted.");
    createLead(data);

    document.getElementById('career_name').value = '';
    document.getElementById('career_email').value = '';
    document.getElementById('career_phone').value = '';
    document.getElementById('career_type').value = '';
    document.getElementById('career_exp').value = '';
    document.getElementById('career_company').value = '';
    document.getElementById('career_portfolio').value = '';
    document.getElementById('career_message').value = '';
    document.getElementById('career_hear').value = '';
    document.getElementById('career_hear_other').value = '';
    document.querySelectorAll('#career_roles .t4l-chip.selected').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('selected'));
    document.getElementById('career_other_wrap').classList.add('d-none');

  } catch(err){
    console.error(err);
    alert(err.message || "Error while submitting. Please try again.");
  } finally {
    if (btn) btn.disabled = false;
  }
}

(function(){
  var greetings = ["Hello!","नमस्ते","హలో!","ನಮಸ್ಕಾರ!","ഹലോ!","Hola!","你好!","Bonjour!","مرحبا!"];
  var i = 0;
  var el = document.getElementById('helloText');
  if(el){
    setInterval(function(){
      i = (i + 1) % greetings.length;
      el.style.opacity = 0;
      setTimeout(function(){
        el.textContent = greetings[i];
        el.style.opacity = 1;
      }, 300);
    }, 2000);
    el.style.transition = 'opacity 0.3s ease';
  }
})();

    alert(hearAbout);
  
  // Basic validation
  if (name === "" || email === "" || phone === "" || cname === "") {
      alert("Fields are empty!");
      return;
  }

  // Validate "Other" option
  if (hearAbout === "Other" && hearAboutOther === "") {
      alert("Please specify how you heard about us.");
      return;
  }

  // Get IP and Country
  let ip = "Unknown";
  let country = "Unknown";
  try {
      const ipData = await fetch("https://ipwho.is/").then(res => res.json());
      ip = ipData.ip || ip;
      country = ipData.country || country;
  } catch (err) {
      console.error("IP API error:", err);
  }

  // Data object
  const data = { 
      name, 
      email,
      pcode,
      phone, 
      cname, 
      jposi, 
      comment, 
      os, 
      ip,
      location: country,

      
      reference: hearAbout,
      other_ref: hearAboutOther
  };

  // Send to backend
  fetch("https://www.tech4lyf.com/contact_back.php", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify(data)
  })
  .then(res => {
      console.log(res);
      if (res.ok) {
          showSuccessMessage();
          createLead(data);
      } else {
          alert("Error while submitting.");
      }
  });
}
async function submitContact1() {
  const name = document.getElementById('name_con').value.trim();
  const email = document.getElementById('email_con').value.trim();
  const phone = document.getElementById('phone_con').value.trim();
  const cname = document.getElementById('cname').value.trim();
  const jposi = document.getElementById('jposi').value.trim();
  const pcode = document.getElementById('countryCode').value.trim();
  const comment = document.getElementById('comment_con').value.trim();
  const os = getOS();

  const hearAbout = document.getElementById('hear_about') ? document.getElementById('hear_about').value.trim() : "";
  const hearAboutOther = document.getElementById('hear_about_other') ? document.getElementById('hear_about_other').value.trim() : "";

  if (name === "" || email === "" || phone === "" || cname === "") {
    alert("Fields are empty!");
    return;
  }

  if (hearAbout === "Other" && hearAboutOther === "") {
    alert("Please specify how you heard about us.");
    return;
  }

  let ip = "Unknown";
  let country = "Unknown";
  try {
    const ipRes = await fetch("https://ipwho.is/").then(r => r.json());
    ip = ipRes.ip || ip;
    country = ipRes.country || country;
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("IP API error:", err);
  }

  const data = {
    name,
    email,
    pcode,
    phone,
    cname,
    jposi,
    comment,
    os,
    ip,
    location: country,
    reference: hearAbout,
    other_ref: hearAboutOther
  };

  try {
    const res = await fetch("https://www.tech4lyf.com/contact_back.php", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify(data)
    });

    if (!res.ok) {
      const t = await res.text().catch(() => null);
      console.error("Server returned non-OK:", res.status, t);
      showErrorMessage("Error while submitting. Try again later.");
      return;
    }

    // success
    showSuccessMessage("Submitted successfully!");
    // call createLead but wrap in try/catch
    try {
      createLead(data);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error("createLead threw:", err);
    }

  } catch (err) {
    console.error("Network/Fetch error:", err);
    showErrorMessage("Network error while submitting.");
  }
}

function showErrorMessage(msg = "Something went wrong") {
  const formResults = document.querySelector('.form-results');
  if (formResults) {
    formResults.classList.remove('d-none');
    formResults.textContent = msg;
  } else {
    alert(msg);
  }
}

function createLead(data1) {
        
      const url = "https://api.tech4lyf.com/create-lead";

      const data = {
        name: data1["comment"],
        email_from: data1["email"],
        mobile: data1["pcode"]+""+data1["phone"],
        contact_name: data1["name"],
        function: data1["jposi"],
        partner_name: data1["cname"]
      };

      fetch(url, {
        method: "POST",
        headers: {
          "Content-Type": "application/json"
        },
        body: JSON.stringify(data)
      })
      .then(response => response.json())
      .then(result => {
        document.getElementById("response").textContent = JSON.stringify(result, null, 2);
        console.log("Success:", result);
      })
      .catch(error => {
        document.getElementById("response").textContent = "Error: " + error;
        console.error("Error:", error);
      });
    }

    function showSuccessMessage() {
        const message = document.getElementById('successMessage');
        message.classList.add('show');

        // Optional: auto-hide after 3 seconds
        setTimeout(() => {
            message.classList.remove('show');
        }, 5000);
    }
</script>
